welcomeLine1: You're welcome here. Whatever's on your mind, you can say it.
welcomeLine2Offline: I'm not at my desk right now, but I read every message and I will reply.
emptyStateBody: When someone opens the chat and sends a message, it will appear here.
errorSendFailed: Couldn't send. Tap to try again.
errorRateLimited: You're sending faster than I can keep up. Give it a moment — nothing you wrote is lost.
errorAdminLogin: That email or password isn't right.
pushGateBody: So I can reach you after you close this tab, allow notifications. You'll only ever be told a reply is waiting — nothing about it is shown until you open the chat yourself.
pushGateDeclinedHeading: Without notifications, I can't reach you again
pushGateDeclinedBody: If you leave now, you can still open this chat later, but I won't be able to let you know when I've replied. You can still say yes.
iosWalkthroughHeading: Add One Chat to your Home Screen first
iosWalkthroughIntro: iPhone only allows notifications for apps added to your Home Screen. It takes a few seconds.
iosWalkthroughStep3: Open One Chat from your Home Screen to continue
